author: KulySocc
description: Open a folder in the file explorer to view its contents as a Bases-powered table of contents, with no companion note required. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Folder Base View

name: Folder Base View

releases.author: KulySocc
releases.description:
### Added
- **Release notes:** a what's-new dialog now appears once after the plugin updates, summarising what changed since the version you last saw. Re-open it anytime with the *Show release notes* command.

### Changed
- **Settings:** added a *Show release notes on update* toggle so you can opt out of the what's-new dialog.

---

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/KulySocc/obsidian-folder-base-view/compare/0.1.0...0.1.2

releases.author: KulySocc
releases.description:
Initial release of Folder Base View.

Click a folder in the file explorer to open a chosen `.base` as its table of contents, scoped to that folder — no companion note required.

Requirements: Obsidian 1.13+ (desktop) with the core Bases plugin enabled.
